name: desktop
description: Thin shell — required by Electron / electron-builder which read `name`, `version`, `main`, `build` from this file at packaging time. All actual dependencies live in the workspace root `package.json` (Phase C of the Bazel migration). DO NOT add `dependencies` / `devDependencies` here; pnpm will hoist them from the root automatically. Build/dev workflows go through Bazel — see the BUILD.bazel for targets.
